query:
SELECT 
  MONTH(dteTermination) as mes,
  YEAR(dteTermination) as ano,
  COUNT(*) as total_baixas
FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE chrStatus IN ('REMOVED', 'RENTED', 'IN_TERMINATION')
  AND dteTermination IS NOT NULL
  AND chrTransactionType = 'SALE'
  AND YEAR(dteTermination) = 2026
GROUP BY YEAR(dteTermination), MONTH(dteTermination)
ORDER BY MONTH(dteTermination);
